All notifications are carry-overs from prior run with incremented timestamps: Carly Baker friend request (3h, was 2h), Junk Removal Owners generic ad post (1h, was 55m), Liam Nowak friend request (6h, was 5h), Car Detailing Business Owners 'From Not in Top 10 to Top 3' post (11h, 3 reactions 3 comments — group activity, generic), Window Cleaning Business Owners new post (5h, was 4h), Car Detailing Business Owners Worldwide @everyone mention (11h, was 10h), Painters Near Me tag (21h, was 20h), Alex Hernandez Movers Connection photo tag (1d). Zero comments on any Novaro AI posts. Messenger inbox: Ryan Bailey outreach DM still unanswered (sent 9:02 PM ET, 1h ago). Ann Giroux chat confirmed empty. Liam Nowak empty chat. Message requests: empty. Spam: 1 item (Room Full of Love 4813 / Holmes Renee sent a link — unchanged from prior run, 8h). Delta this run: 0 new inbound comments, 0 positive, 0 new inbound DMs, 0 interest signals. No Notion leads logged. Cumulative totals unchanged: 18 groups, 116 comments, 39 positive, 4 DMs, 13 interest signals.
